zh.Great Waltham, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Drake於大約1321年4月25日出生在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦時，他的父親Nicholas Drake Jr.46歲，母親Julianna Greenville41歲。他和Ellen Prideux至少有1個兒子。他去世於1392年7月在他的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Drake于大约1321年4月25日出生在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦时，他的父亲Nicholas Drake Jr.46岁，母亲Julianna Greenville41岁。他和Ellen Prideux至少有1个儿子。他去世于1392年7月在他的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

variants.name: Duck
meanings: Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as an equivalent of Lohan (an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Leocháin ‘descendant of Leochán’) by mistranslation, as if from lacha ‘duck’.
North German (also Dück) and German (Dück): see Dueck .

variants.name: Drakes
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Drake was born about 25 April 1321, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, his father, Nicholas Drake Jr., was 46 and his mother, Julianna Greenville, was 41. He had at least 1 son with Ellen Prideux. He died in July 1392, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Drake est né environ 25 avril 1321, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Drake Jr., avait 46 ans et sa mère, Julianna Greenville, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ellen Prideux. Il est décédé en juillet 1392, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Drake um 25. April 1321 in Great Waltham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Drake Jr. 46 und seine Mutter Julianna Greenville 41. Er hatte mit Ellen Prideux mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Juli 1392 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Drake è nato il circa 25 aprile 1321 nel Great Waltham, Essex, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Drake Jr., aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Julianna Greenville, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ellen Prideux. Morì nel luglio 1392, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Drakeが約1321年4月25日にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで生まれた時，父Nicholas Drake Jr.は46歳，母Julianna Greenvilleは41歳であった。彼はEllen Prideuxとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1392年7月に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Drake(이)가 대략 1321년 4월 25일 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Drake Jr.(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianna Greenville(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Ellen Prideux(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1392년 7월 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Drake nasceu aproximadamente 25 de abril de 1321, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Drake Jr., tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Julianna Greenville, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ellen Prideux. Ele faleceu em julho de 1392, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Drake родился около 25 апреля 1321 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Drake Jr. было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Julianna Greenville, 41. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ellen Prideux. Он умер июль 1392 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Drake nació aproximadamente 25 de abril de 1321, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Drake Jr., tenía 46 años y su mamá, Julianna Greenville, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ellen Prideux. Murió en julio de 1392, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
